DATABASE_URI.help: The database URI, following the sqlalchemy format.
DATABASE_URI.label: The database URI

DATABASE_URI_READONLY.help: The database URI for read-only operations, it can also serve as a fallback if the main database is down. Following the sqlalchemy format.
DATABASE_URI_READONLY.label: The database URI for read-only operations

DATABASE_LOG_LEVEL.help: The level to use for database logs.
DATABASE_LOG_LEVEL.label: Database log level

DATABASE_MAX_JOBS_RUNS.help: The maximum number of jobs runs to keep in the database.
DATABASE_MAX_JOBS_RUNS.label: The maximum number of jobs runs

DATABASE_MAX_SESSION_AGE_DAYS.help: The maximum age in days for UI user sessions before they are purged.
DATABASE_MAX_SESSION_AGE_DAYS.label: The maximum age in days for UI user sessions

DATABASE_POOL_SIZE.help: The number of connections to keep in the database connection pool.
DATABASE_POOL_SIZE.label: Database pool size

DATABASE_POOL_MAX_OVERFLOW.help: The maximum number of connections to create above the pool size.
DATABASE_POOL_MAX_OVERFLOW.label: Database pool max overflow

DATABASE_POOL_TIMEOUT.help: The number of seconds to wait before giving up on getting a connection from the pool.
DATABASE_POOL_TIMEOUT.label: Database pool timeout

DATABASE_POOL_RECYCLE.help: The number of seconds after which a connection is automatically recycled. Set to -1 to disable.
DATABASE_POOL_RECYCLE.label: Database pool recycle

DATABASE_POOL_PRE_PING.help: Whether to test connections for liveness upon each checkout from the pool.
DATABASE_POOL_PRE_PING.label: Database pool pre-ping

DATABASE_POOL_RESET_ON_RETURN.help: How the connection should be reset when returned to the pool. Leave empty for auto (none for MySQL/MariaDB, rollback for others). Possible values: rollback, commit, none.
DATABASE_POOL_RESET_ON_RETURN.label: Database pool reset on return

DATABASE_RETRY_TIMEOUT.help: The maximum number of seconds to wait for the database to be available on startup.
DATABASE_RETRY_TIMEOUT.label: Database retry timeout

DATABASE_REQUEST_RETRY_ATTEMPTS.help: The number of retry attempts for transient database errors.
DATABASE_REQUEST_RETRY_ATTEMPTS.label: Database request retry attempts

DATABASE_REQUEST_RETRY_DELAY.help: The delay in seconds between retry attempts for transient database errors.
DATABASE_REQUEST_RETRY_DELAY.label: Database request retry delay
